class.name: NexScript
class.brief_description: A script written in the NEX scripting language.
class.description: NexScript is a statically-typed scripting language for Godot with Rust-inspired syntax. Files use the [code].nex[/code] extension. NEX is immutable-by-default: bindings declared with [code]let[/code] cannot be reassigned. Use [code]var[/code] for mutable bindings.
